details.name: Monaco 2022 - Double Stack Disaster
details.reasoning: Undercut possible in ~4 laps, projected gain 1.5s. Good tyre life remaining, no need to pit

details.name: Britain 2022 - Unnecessary SC Pit
details.reasoning: Good tyre life remaining, no need to pit

details.name: Hungary 2022 - Wrong Compound on Restart
details.reasoning: Extreme deg rate 0.33s/lap - losing >0.2s every lap. FORCED PIT: 0.33s/lap deg is unsustainable, losing 10.2s total if staying out. Pit for MEDIUM projects P5 vs P1 staying out

details.name: Bahrain 2023 - Failed Overcut
details.reasoning: High deg rate of 0.19s/lap. Staying out despite elevated degradation

details.name: Singapore 2023 - VSC Missed Pit
details.reasoning: Safety car: Tyres at 48% - opportunistic stop; Gap behind (6.2s) too small - will lose position; OVERRIDE: 18 laps remaining, switch to SOFT for pace advantage

details.name: Netherlands 2022 - VSC Missed Opportunity
details.reasoning: Safety car: Tyres at 6% - too fresh to waste; Mid/back position - less to lose from pitting; OVERRIDE: 24 laps remaining, switch to SOFT for pace advantage

details.name: Spain 2023 - Late Pit Timing
details.reasoning: Tyres near cliff - only ~0 laps remaining on SOFT. Undercut possible in ~2 laps, projected gain 2.0s. Pit for HARD projects P12 vs P20 staying out
